title: HR and Payroll Outsourcing Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: Simplify and maintain compliance with HR and payroll outsourcing in Vietnam, including recruitment, payroll, insurance, and personal income tax.

hero.title: HR and Payroll Outsourcing Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: WTP Advisory offers HR and Payroll Services, simplifying and ensuring compliance in all HR aspects in Vietnam, including recruitment, payroll, insurance, and personal income taxes. Overcome workforce management challenges with a trusted partner who puts your needs first.

sections.heading: Types of Vietnam Increased Insurance Payment Caps

rows.label: Maximum cap of Accident & Occupational Disease Insurance
Eligibility for 100% coverage of medical expenses (after paying 5 consecutive years of health insurance)

sections.heading: HR Initial Establishment Package
body: Get set up correctly from day one. Our HR Initial Establishment Package covers the foundational labor and social insurance declarations your company needs to operate compliantly in Vietnam.

sections.heading: Initial Labor Declaration
body: Streamline employee onboarding and ensure adherence to labor regulations. Develop fair and appealing salary structures to attract and retain talent with salary scaling strategies.

sections.subtitle: Initial Labor Declaration will help your business with:
items: Initial Labor Report submission (required for every company with employees)
Company Regulation registered with the local authorities if the total employees are 10 or above registered at your company
Salary scale set up (detailed information for each position and level)

sections.heading: Initial Social Insurance Declaration
body: We streamline document management, ensure precise insurance handling, maintain comprehensive employee records, and efficiently monitor your workforce.

sections.subtitle: Initial Social Insurance Declaration will help your business with:
items: Delivering documents sheet (list out the details of the company and related people)
Participating and Adjusting Declaration sheet on Social, Health and Unemployment Insurance for each employee
Creating a list of Employee Information and Company Labor List

sections.heading: HR, Payroll, Insurance and PIT Processing & Reporting
body: Keep your operations running month after month. Our recurring service covers labor data, payroll calculations, SHUI compliance, personal income tax and ongoing HR operation support.

sections.heading: Initial Labor
body: Whether you're an HR-registered client or not, we collect vital data, including contracts and employee information, and prepare essential payroll documents to streamline your operations.

sections.subtitle: If you used HR Initial Establishment services, Initial Setup includes:
items: Collect copies of employee contracts from your business
Collect employee information from your business
Prepare payroll document template

sections.subtitle: If you haven't used our HR Initial Establishment services, Initial Setup includes:
items: Collect company information include: (1) Labor Department information and current status for all mandatory reports, (2) SHUI current status, (3) PIT current status, (4) Trade Union current status
Collect employee contracts from your business
Collect employee information from your business
Prepare payroll document template

sections.heading: Payroll Tasks
body: We handle comprehensive payroll calculations, covering Gross to Net/Net to Gross, Personal Income Tax, insurance, severance allowances, and bonuses, while also generating the required monthly reports.

sections.subtitle: Payroll outsourcing will help you to:
items: Calculate payroll based on your timesheet, annual leave and basic employee information reports to do monthly payroll including: Gross to Net/Net to Gross, Personal Income Tax, Social, Health and Unemployment Insurance, severance allowance (if any), bonus/incentive accuracy (if any), final payments for resigned staffs

sections.heading: Social, Health & Unemployment Insurance (SHUI)
body: WTP Advisory handle a wide range of SHUI Authority compliance tasks, from monthly reports, maternity and sick leave claims, to labor accidents. We also manage health insurance cards and payment requests for seamless operations.

sections.subtitle: Social, Health & Unemployment Insurance (SHUI) service from WTP Advisory can help you:
items: Complete the monthly/one-off report to SHUI Authority per SI law
Increase/Decrease/Changes report before 20th day of month
Maternity claim / sick leave claim (if any)
Labor accident/occupational disease (if any) by hard copy
Issue/renew Hi card
SI book closing
Salary, information update for social insurance book
Reconciling the SHUI contribution recording of SI Authority, comparison with payroll data
Obtaining health insurance cards for employees
Make payment requests and send them to the accountant for payment before the last day of the month

sections.heading: Personal Income Tax (PIT)
body: We will efficiently prepare and submit monthly/quarterly personal income tax declarations, both online and in hard copy, based on accurate payroll data. WTP Advisory also handle the lodgement of PIT reports with the Tax Department.

sections.subtitle: This Personal Income Tax (PIT) service will help you to:
items: Prepare and submit the monthly/quarterly personal income tax declaration based on the monthly payroll reports (both online submission and hard copy submission)
Lodge the PIT reports to the Tax Department based on the payroll

sections.heading: Year-end PIT Tax Finalization & Book
body: Yearly PIT Finalization is for your business with employees working a full calendar year with one income source. WTP Advisory issue income confirmations and tax receipts.

sections.subtitle: This Year-end PIT Tax Finalization & Book service will help you with:
items: Yearly PIT Finalization is only applicable when your employees work a full calendar year with you. Those employees only have one source of income from the company.
Issue Income confirmation and Tax receipt issuance.

sections.heading: Register the Personal Income Tax Code for New Hire (Local) or Dependants
body: Our team will register personal income tax codes for new local hires and dependents, provide consultation on required documents, and submit dependent declarations online.

sections.subtitle: This Register the personal income tax code for new hire (local) or dependants service will help you with:
items: Consult the supporting documents
Submit the dependent declaration (online submission)

sections.heading: HR Operation Supporting
body: Discover our HR Operation Support services, simplifying compliance and documentation, so you can focus on your business while we manage HR operations.

sections.subtitle: This HR Operation Supporting service will help you to:
items: Consult, prepare the checklist, collect, fill the employee recording documents per labor law
Prepare, collect, filing the offer letter, labor contract, decisions, filling for employees
Collect, filling the dependant's documentation and supporting documents

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions on HR and Payroll Outsourcing

items.q: Do I need a legal entity in Vietnam to hire employees?
items.a: You can recruit both local and foreign employees in Vietnam for your company without establishing a legal entity. Common ways to do this include using recruitment technology platforms, employer of record (EOR) providers, or direct hiring through various communication channels (LinkedIn, Facebook, and so on).

items.q: Can I pay my employees from abroad as a foreign employer?
items.a: You can set up your payroll and payroll compliance entirely remotely. As legal obligations, you have to submit all paperwork for employee declaration and salary payment to relevant authorities (namely the Department or Ministry of Labour, Invalids and Social Affairs).

items.q: What are all the services included in the HR and payroll outsourcing package?
items.a: When applying for our comprehensive HR outsourcing services, you have the option of choosing one of, some of, or all of the following: HR initial establishment (labor and social insurance declaration), payroll processing, SHUI compliance, personal income tax declaration and finalization, PIT code registration, and HR operation support.
